subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O my God, for having guided me to the ocean of Thy oneness, and for having enabled me to recognize Him Who is the Dayspring of Thy signs
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما هدیتنی الی بحر توحیدک و عرفتنی مطلع آیاتک و مشرق افقک
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @prayer for unity, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
